name: PPT Live
description: AI deck studio for PPT generation and editing: create an outline, generate designed slides, refine page content, preview, and export editable PPTX or shareable HTML.
permission_rationale: PPT Live stores only its own deck draft, fetches user-provided URLs only when generating source-grounded decks, runs hidden BitFun agent turns (ppt-design skill plus research tools such as WebSearch/WebFetch) only when the user asks it to generate or refine content, and exports PPTX/PDF/PNG/HTML entirely inside the desktop WebView.

ai_context.original_prompt: A built-in Live App for AI-assisted PPT generation, preview, and visual editing.

zh-CN.name: PPT 工作台
zh-CN.description: AI PPT 工作台：生成大纲、生成设计页面、局部优化、演示预览，并导出可编辑 PPTX 或 HTML 演示稿。

en-US.name: PPT Live
en-US.description: AI deck studio for PPT generation and editing: create an outline, generate designed slides, refine page content, preview, and export editable PPTX or shareable HTML.
